
```{r}
forecastStarma <- function(data_long, year_col_name, country_col_name, variable_name, model, wlist, num_steps_fc, l, p, difference){
  
  st_data <- dataPreparationStarima(data_long = data_long, year_col_name = year_col_name, country_col_name = country_col_name, variable_name = variable_name, difference = difference)
  
  st_helper <- matrix(0, ncol=num_steps_fc, nrow=nrow(t(st_data)))
  STARIMA_FC <- cbind(t(st_data), st_helper)
  
  year_names <- unique(eval(parse(text = paste0("data_long$", year_col_name))))
  T <- length(year_names)
  
  country_names <- unique(eval(parse(text = paste0("data_long$", country_col_name))))
  N <- length(country_names)
  
  helper_country <- eval(parse(text = paste0("data_long$", country_col_name)))
  helper_variable <- eval(parse(text = paste0("data_long$", variable_name)))
  
  starima_data <- matrix(unlist(split(helper_variable, helper_country)), nrow=T, ncol=N)
  
  if (difference == TRUE){
    
    starima_data_diff <- as.matrix(sapply(data.frame(starima_data), diff))
    
    mean <- mean(starima_data_diff)
    sd <- sd(starima_data_diff)
    
  } else {
    
    mean <- mean(starima_data)
    sd <- sd(starima_data)
  }

phi_mat <- model$phi
theta_mat <- model$theta

res_helper <- matrix(0, ncol=num_steps_fc, nrow=nrow(t(model$residuals)))
resid_mat <- cbind(t(model$residuals), res_helper) #future residuals are treated az zero (from 2005 split year in this case)

for (k in 1:num_steps_fc) {
  # start accumulation vector
  acc_ar <- matrix(0, nrow = nrow(t(st_data)), ncol = 1)
  acc_ma <- matrix(0, nrow = nrow(t(st_data)), ncol = 1)
  
  # AR part (phi)
  if (!(nrow(phi_mat)==0 && ncol(phi_mat)==0)) {
  for (j in 1:p) {
      for (i in 1:l) {
          phi_ji <- model$phi[j, i]
          if (!is.na(phi_ji) && phi_ji != 0) {
            acc_ar <- acc_ar + phi_ji * (wlist[[i]] %*% STARIMA_FC[, ncol(t(st_data)) - j + k])
          }
      }
  }
}
  
# MA part (phi)
  if (!(nrow(theta_mat)==0 && ncol(theta_mat)==0)) {
  for (j in 1:nrow(theta_mat)) {
      for (i in 1:ncol(theta_mat)) {
          theta_ji <- model$theta[j, i]
          if (!is.na(theta_ji) && theta_ji != 0) {
            acc_ma <- acc_ma + theta_ji * (wlist[[i]] %*% resid_mat[, ncol(t(model$residuals)) - j + k])
          }
      }
  }
}

  STARIMA_FC[, ncol(t(st_data)) + k] <- acc_ar + acc_ma + mean(model$residuals, na.rm = TRUE)
}

  STARIMA_FC <- STARIMA_FC*sd+mean
  
  T <- ncol(t(st_data))
  N <- nrow(t(st_data))
  
  if (difference == TRUE){
    
    nrow=T+1
    
  } else {
    
    nrow=T
  }
  
  helper_year <- unique(eval(parse(text = paste0("data_long$", year_col_name))))
  helper_data <- data.frame(matrix(unlist(split(helper_variable, helper_country)), nrow=nrow, ncol=N))
  
  if(difference == TRUE){
    fc_matrix_no_difference <- matrix(0, ncol=num_steps_fc, nrow = N)
    fc_matrix_no_difference[,1] <- t(helper_data)[, T+1] + STARIMA_FC[,T+1]
    
    for (i in 2:num_steps_fc){
      fc_matrix_no_difference[,i] <- fc_matrix_no_difference[,i-1] + STARIMA_FC[,T+i]
    }
    
    max_year <- as.numeric(max(helper_year))
    fc_matrix_no_difference_names <- c((max_year+1):(max_year+num_steps_fc))
    
    colnames(fc_matrix_no_difference) <- fc_matrix_no_difference_names
    rownames(fc_matrix_no_difference) <- colnames(st_data)
    
    return(fc_matrix_no_difference)
    
  } else {
    
    max_year <- as.numeric(max(helper_year))
    fc_matrix_no_difference_names <- c((max_year+1):(max_year+num_steps_fc))
    
    STARIMA_FC_f <- STARIMA_FC[,(T+1):ncol(STARIMA_FC)]
    
    colnames(STARIMA_FC_f) <- fc_matrix_no_difference_names
    rownames(STARIMA_FC_f) <- colnames(st_data)
    
    return(STARIMA_FC_f)
  }
}

```
